lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-20 wounds remaining, subtract 10 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks only.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend three times that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-26 wounds remaining, subtract 10 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks only.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly IMPERIUM model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly CHAOS model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend three times that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 8" to the Move characteristic of this model.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-13 wounds remaining, subtract 8 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks only.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend twice that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks only.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-33 wounds remaining, subtract 15 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend four times that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.
